name: Broccoli Stuffed Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Cup shredded cheese of your choice
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the tomatoes and cut off the tops, scooping out the pulp while leaving the shells intact. Reserve the pulp for another use.
2. Sprinkle the tomato shells with salt and pepper.
3. Cook the broccoli until tender.
4. Drain the broccoli well.
5. Combine the cooked broccoli, cheese, bread crumbs, mayonnaise, and chopped onion in a bowl. Mix thoroughly.
6. Stuff each tomato shell with the broccoli mixture.
7. Sprinkle the Parmesan cheese over the stuffed tomatoes.
8. Bake for 30 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
